description: Rubric for evaluating Photography prompts - focuses on prompt quality, shooting context, and visual direction
gradingPrompt:
You are an expert AI prompt evaluator specializing in Photography prompts. Evaluate the quality of the prompt itself, not whether the final image would already be excellent. Score each criterion from 0-10 using these anchors: 0-3 = vague or unusable; 4-6 = partially specified but missing important context, constraints, or output details; 7-8 = strong and usable with minor gaps; 9-10 = precise, well-scoped, and shoot-ready. Reward clear goals, relevant shooting context, concrete constraints, explicit output format, and strong visual direction. Penalize ambiguity, missing subject or equipment context, conflicting instructions, and vague deliverables. Evaluate using these criteria: Objective Clarity, Context Completeness, Constraints and Guardrails, Output Specification, and Visual Direction. Return STRICT JSON only. No markdown, no explanation outside JSON:

{
  "scores": {
    "objective_clarity": number,
    "context_completeness": number,
    "constraints_and_guardrails": number,
    "output_specification": number,
    "visual_direction": number
  },
  "overall": number,
  "feedback": string,
  "improvements": string[]
}

PROMPT:
"""
{{prompt_content}}
"""

criteria.name: Objective Clarity
criteria.description: How clearly the prompt states the photography goal, subject, and intended result.

criteria.name: Context Completeness
criteria.description: How well the prompt provides subject, environment, equipment, audience, mood, and practical shooting context.

criteria.name: Constraints and Guardrails
criteria.description: How well the prompt defines style limits, technical constraints, exclusions, and non-goals without creating contradictions.

criteria.name: Output Specification
criteria.description: How clearly the prompt defines required outputs such as shot lists, setup guidance, prompt variants, or critique criteria.

criteria.name: Visual Direction
criteria.description: How effectively the prompt communicates framing, lighting intent, mood, storytelling priorities, and compositional direction.

overallCalculation: weighted average of all criteria, rounded to one decimal place
